title: Package Workflow Compression Follow-Ups Closeout
summary: Classify #380-#386 after the package workflow compression follow-up slice landed and was archived.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Add a cheap friction-capture path
issue_classifications.evidence: Workspace report repo_friction now includes capture_shortcut with minimum record fields, cheap destinations, and promotion trigger guidance.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Report external-work ingest deltas compactly
issue_classifications.evidence: Workspace report now includes external_work_delta and a section selector that compares provider-agnostic current items with optional previous_items when available.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Warn when new surfaces expand first-contact burden
issue_classifications.evidence: Surface value guardrail now exposes first_contact_budget with review tests and warning language against additive first-contact surfaces.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Strengthen task-shape recommender for direct vs planned work
issue_classifications.evidence: Workspace report execution_shape now includes task_shape_recommender with direct, light-plan, and checked-in-execplan workflow shapes.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Expose package-use proof in broad-work closeout
issue_classifications.evidence: closeout_trust package_workflow_evidence now names expected surfaces, optional surfaces, missing expected surfaces, and evidence quality.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Add closeout intent-satisfaction check
issue_classifications.evidence: closeout_trust now includes intent_satisfaction_check so broad work distinguishes local proof success from larger intent satisfaction or follow-up needs.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Make narrow-work fast path explicit
issue_classifications.evidence: Workspace report execution_shape now exposes narrow_work_fast_path when no broad plan is active and the summary execution_readiness stays narrow-direct-ready.
